source_intake_record.raw_question_text: The molar specific heat at constant volume of a monatomic ideal gas is known to be $\frac{3}{2}R$. Suppose that one mole of such a gas is subjected to a cyclic quasi-static process which appears as a circle on the diagram of pressure $p$ versus volume $V$ shown in the figure. Find the net work (in joules) done by the gas in one cycle.
